scripts.scrape-lambda:ropewiki: npm run merge:main-template && sam build RopewikiScraper --template cloudformation/stacks/mergedMainTemplate.yaml --use-container --build-image public.ecr.aws/sam/build-nodejs22.x; sam local invoke RopewikiScraper --template cloudformation/stacks/mergedMainTemplate.yaml --event events/RopewikiScraperCronEvent.json --env-vars samEnvVars.json --docker-network my-net
scripts.process-lambda:ropewiki-page: npm run update-event:ropewiki-page-processor 10; npm run merge:main-template && sam build RopewikiPageProcessor --template cloudformation/stacks/mergedMainTemplate.yaml --use-container --build-image public.ecr.aws/sam/build-nodejs22.x; sam local invoke RopewikiPageProcessor --template cloudformation/stacks/mergedMainTemplate.yaml --event events/RopewikiPageProcessorSQSEvent.json --env-vars samEnvVars.json --docker-network my-net
scripts.process-lambda:map-data: npm run update-event:map-data-processor ropewiki 10; npm run merge:main-template && sam build MapDataProcessor --template cloudformation/stacks/mergedMainTemplate.yaml --use-container --build-image public.ecr.aws/sam/build-nodejs22.x:latest-arm64; sam local invoke MapDataProcessor --template cloudformation/stacks/mergedMainTemplate.yaml --event events/MapDataProcessorSQSEvent.json --env-vars samEnvVars.json --docker-network my-net
scripts.scrape:ropewiki: DB_HOST=127.0.0.1 DB_PORT=8081 DB_NAME=local DB_USER=localUser DB_PASSWORD=localPass DEV_ENVIRONMENT=local ts-node --files src/ropewiki/main.ts
scripts.process:map-data: DB_HOST=127.0.0.1 DB_PORT=8081 DB_NAME=local DB_USER=localUser DB_PASSWORD=localPass ts-node --files scripts/processMapData.ts ropewiki
scripts.process:image-data: DB_HOST=127.0.0.1 DB_PORT=8081 DB_NAME=local DB_USER=localUser DB_PASSWORD=localPass ts-node --files scripts/processImageData.ts ropewiki
scripts.process:ropewiki-page: DB_HOST=127.0.0.1 DB_PORT=8081 DB_NAME=local DB_USER=localUser DB_PASSWORD=localPass ts-node --files scripts/processRopewikiPage.ts
scripts.update-event:ropewiki-page-processor: DB_HOST=127.0.0.1 DB_PORT=8081 DB_NAME=local DB_USER=localUser DB_PASSWORD=localPass ts-node --files scripts/updateRopewikiPageProcessorSQSEvent.ts
scripts.update-event:map-data-processor: DB_HOST=127.0.0.1 DB_PORT=8081 DB_NAME=local DB_USER=localUser DB_PASSWORD=localPass ts-node --files scripts/updateMapDataProcessorSQSEvent.ts
scripts.test:get-ropewiki-page-for-region: DB_HOST=127.0.0.1 DB_PORT=8081 DB_NAME=local DB_USER=localUser DB_PASSWORD=localPass ts-node --files scripts/testGetRopewikiPageForRegion.ts
scripts.merge:api-template: npx ts-node --files scripts/mergeTemplate.ts cloudformation/stacks/api cloudformation/stacks/mergedApiTemplate.yaml "WebScraper HTTP API and CloudFront (OpenAPI from docs bucket)"
scripts.build:openapi: mkdir -p docs-build && cp openapi-docs/index.html docs-build/index.html && npx @redocly/cli bundle openapi-docs/index.yaml -o docs-build/openapi.yaml --dereferenced && npx @redocly/cli bundle openapi-docs/index.yaml -o docs-build/openapi.json --dereferenced
scripts.lint:openapi: npx @redocly/cli bundle openapi-docs/index.yaml -o docs-build/openapi-bundled.yaml --dereferenced && spectral lint --verbose -r openapi-docs/.spectral.yaml docs-build/openapi-bundled.yaml
scripts.local-db:start: docker network create -d bridge my-net; docker run --publish 127.0.0.1:8081:5432/tcp --network=my-net --name local-db -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=localPass -e POSTGRES_USER=localUser -e POSTGRES_DB=local -d postgres; sleep 1; npm run migrate:up
scripts.test-db:start: docker run --publish 127.0.0.1:8080:5432/tcp --name test-db -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=testPass -e POSTGRES_USER=testUser -e POSTGRES_DB=test -d postgres; sleep 1; npm run migrate-test:up
scripts.test-db:delete: docker stop test-db; docker rm test-db
scripts.test:database: npm run test-db:start && (TEST_USER=testUser TEST_PASS=testPass TEST_HOST=127.0.0.1 TEST_PORT=8080 TEST_DB=test jest -i --testPathPatterns=/test/ropewiki/database/* --testPathPatterns=/test/ropewiki/integration/* --testPathPatterns=/test/map-data/database/* --testPathPatterns=/test/image-data/database/* --testPathPatterns='/test/api/.*/database/' --testPathPatterns='/test/api/.*/integration/' --testPathPatterns='/test/fargate-tasks/.*/database/'); R=$?; npm run test-db:delete || true; exit $R
scripts.test:local: npm run test:unit && npm run test:database
